# System: "I found several modern European restaurants in the center of Cambridge: 1. De Luca Cucina and Bar - moderate price, known for roasted Barbary duck breast. 2. The River Bar Steakhouse and Grill - cheap price, known for lobster mac and cheese. Would you like to book one of these or need more details about any of them?"

Would you like to book any of these?"
